fields.label: API Key
fields.helpText: Generate at elevenlabs.io → Profile → API Keys

healthcheck_config.description: Validates API key via ElevenLabs /user/subscription endpoint

metadata.summary: ElevenLabs AI voice generation, text-to-speech, and audio processing platform.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to elevenlabs.io and sign in
2. Click your profile icon → Profile + API key
3. Click the eye icon or 'Create API Key'
4. Copy the generated API key
